description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a bald head, standing upright and shirtless. His skin tone is medium, and his upper body is well-defined, showing visible musculature in the chest, shoulders, and arms. He is wearing fitted, slightly wrinkled pants that reach just above the ankles, and sturdy boots that appear suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The figure's hands are relaxed at his sides, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall appearance suggests a casual, utilitarian style, appropriate for an urban environment.
description: A shirtless, muscular adult male with a bald head, wearing fitted pants and sturdy boots, standing upright in a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the defined chest, abdominal muscles, and facial features, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, arm, and the contour of the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad back, shoulder muscles, and the fit of the pants and boots from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg contours.
attribute_clothing_type: casual fitted pants and sturdy boots
